title: Estimation
description: Planning-poker estimation history for a use-case (Opportunity Management v2). v2 change vs #014 opportunity-estimation: subjectRef points to a use-case id (not an opportunity), because story points are estimated against a product-bound use-case, not a product-agnostic idea. The latest entry in estimations[] is the rollup surfaced as use-case.storyPoints. '<slug>.estimation.json' sits beside its use-case in the venture 'records/' pool.

schemaVersion.description: Contract version this document was authored against (e.g. '2.0.0').

subjectRef.description: Id of the use-case (use-case.schema.json) being estimated.

estimations.description: Chronological planning-poker rounds; the latest sets the use-case storyPoints rollup.

storyPoints.description: Estimated story points for this round.
